languages.text: {n}Вы бросаетесь прочь, на ходу вытаскивая вокс и радируя блюстителям. За вашей спиной раздается раздраженный оклик, после чего вспыхнувшие на стенах зеленые блики оповещают вас о том, что видение пропало в последней вспышке света.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы бросаетесь прочь, на ходу вытаскивая вокс и радируя блюстителям. За вашей спиной раздается раздраженный оклик, после чего вспыхнувшие на стенах зеленые блики оповещают вас о том, что видение пропало в последней вспышке света.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы бросаетесь прочь, на ходу вытаскивая вокс и радируя блюстителям. За вашей спиной раздается раздраженный оклик, после чего вспыхнувшие на стенах зеленые блики оповещают вас о том, что видение пропало в последней вспышке света.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

{n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

{n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你冲了出去，边跑边拿出音阵呼叫执法者。你听到身后传来一声恼怒的低喝，随后墙上那道绿光提醒着你，那幻象已在最后一道闪光中消失无踪。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你冲了出去，边跑边拿出音阵呼叫执法者。你听到身后传来一声恼怒的低喝，随后墙上那道绿光提醒着你，那幻象已在最后一道闪光中消失无踪。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te alejas a toda prisa, sacando rápidamente el voco para convocar a los guardias mientras corres. Escuchas una exclamación molesta a tus espaldas, y después el brillo verde de las paredes te indica que la visión se ha desvanecido con un último destello.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te alejas a toda prisa, sacando rápidamente el voco para convocar a los guardias mientras corres. Escuchas una exclamación molesta a tus espaldas, y después el brillo verde de las paredes te indica que la visión se ha desvanecido con un último destello.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous partez en courant, vous emparez de votre vox et appelez les prévôts tout en fuyant. Une exclamation frustrée résonne derrière vous, puis un reflet vert sur les cloisons vous avertit que l'intrus a disparu dans un dernier éclat de lumière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous partez en courant, vous emparez de votre vox et appelez les prévôts tout en fuyant. Une exclamation frustrée résonne derrière vous, puis un reflet vert sur les cloisons vous avertit que l'intrus a disparu dans un dernier éclat de lumière.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Koşarak uzaklaşıyorsun, voks cihazını çıkarıyor ve koşarken infazcıları çağırıyorsun. Arkanda canı sıkkın bir haykırış duyuyorsun. Sonrasında duvarlardaki yeşil parıltı, görüntünün son bir ışık parlamasıyla yok olduğunu gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Koşarak uzaklaşıyorsun, voks cihazını çıkarıyor ve koşarken infazcıları çağırıyorsun. Arkanda canı sıkkın bir haykırış duyuyorsun. Sonrasında duvarlardaki yeşil parıltı, görüntünün son bir ışık parlamasıyla yok olduğunu gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du ergreifst die Flucht und rufst per Vox Enforcer zu dir. Du hörst hinter dir einen verärgerten Ausruf, und der grüne Schein an den Wänden sagt dir, dass sich die Vision in einem letzten Lichtblitz aufgelöst hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du ergreifst die Flucht und rufst per Vox Enforcer zu dir. Du hörst hinter dir einen verärgerten Ausruf, und der grüne Schein an den Wänden sagt dir, dass sich die Vision in einem letzten Lichtblitz aufgelöst hat.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは駆け出し、走りながらヴォックスを取り出して執行官を呼ぶ。背後でいらだたしげな叫びが聞こえ、そして壁に走る緑の輝きが、その幻影が最後の閃光とともに消え去ったことを告げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You rush away, pulling out your vox and calling enforcers as you run. You hear a vexed exclamation behind you, and then the green gleam on the walls tells you that the vision has vanished in a final flash of light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたは駆け出し、走りながらヴォックスを取り出して執行官を呼ぶ。背後でいらだたしげな叫びが聞こえ、そして壁に走る緑の輝きが、その幻影が最後の閃光とともに消え去ったことを告げる。{/n}
